Xie Zan Ë¨ùË¥ä
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xie Zan (Ë¨ùË¥ä)was born in Kuaiji commandery. A famous man considered to be among the likes of Zhongli Yin and Gu Tan. Xie Zan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
